message:
fix: review fixes for PR #2000 deterministic git state in handoff

- Add git.Git.RecentCommits() method so collectGitState() no longer
  shells out to git directly, fulfilling the no shelling out goal
- Use g.IsRepo() early return instead of failing mid-collection
- Do not bail on CheckUncommittedWork error - skip that section but
  keep branch info and other state already collected
- Use t.Chdir() instead of os.Chdir() in tests (goroutine-safe)

Original contribution by seanbearden (PR #2000, GH#1996).

Co-Authored-By: sean <72461227+seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
